steps.title: Apply the substitution from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $x+20 = 27$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. It's given that $x=7$. Substituting $7$ for $x$ into the given expression $x+20$ yields $7+20$, which is equivalent to $27$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $x+6$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $x+13$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $x+27$.
